asset_name: Timing Bar — idle, Good, Perfect states
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Bar width matches the documented 600x30 px timing widget.
Good and Perfect windows align with the lane impact marker and player slot.
differences: This file carries idle, Good-active, and Perfect-flash states.
Perfect state pushes cyan energy to the center notch while Good state emphasizes the lime outer band.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground 600x30 px timing bar size and Perfect or Good windows.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/ui_timing_bar_600x30.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_timing_bar_600x30.
runtime_notes: Create a 3-column TextureAtlasLayout for idle, Good, and Perfect states.
Anchor the bar to the overlay camera at x=660 y=850.
Use deterministic state swaps so the widget flash aligns with timing resolution in the same simulation frame.

context.usage: Shown while a projectile is active and flashes on Good or Perfect timing resolution.

shape.silhouette: Long horizontal timing rail with a cyan center notch and lime outer scoring band.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet canvas is exactly 1800x30 px with three 600x30 states.
Perfect notch width is exactly 80 px and centered at x=300 in every state.
Good band width is exactly 180 px and remains symmetric around the center notch.
